title: attribution — published macros
description: Three request-level macros that surface the resolved attribution + its frozen snapshot from the RequestContext (set by the attribution.capture middleware). Registered by AttributionServiceProvider::boot(). No Blueprint macros — the owned tables use standard column shapes.
namespace_note: Macros extend Illuminate\Http\Request. Middleware-set context bleeds through the Request accessor without needing to plumb it through service constructors.

macros.name: Request::currentAttribution
macros.adds: A single accessor on the framework Request class that returns the resolved Attribution model (or null when no attribution context / consent refused).
macros.description: Reads from RequestContext::attribution() set by the attribution.capture middleware. Lazy-loads the model on first access — subsequent calls in the same request return the cached instance.

macros.name: Request::currentAttributionId
macros.adds: Convenience accessor returning just the ID.
macros.description: Returns the id string without triggering the model load. Useful for creators that just need the FK.

macros.name: Request::attributionSnapshot
macros.adds: Returns the frozen attribution snapshot jsonb blob for downstream events.
macros.description: Delegates to AttributionSnapshotBuilder::build() with the current attribution. Cached per-request so repeated calls don't rebuild the blob. This is the canonical way downstream code freezes attribution into an event row.

no_blueprint_macros.reason: The attribution module's owned tables (attributions, attribution_touchpoints) use standard column shapes. Downstream modules that want to carry an attribution snapshot on their own rows add a plain `attribution jsonb NULL` column — a Blueprint macro for that would be over-engineering for a one-column addition.
